name: Betrayed 1x1x1x1 (FORSAKEN)
description:
Genderbent 1x1x1x1 from Forsaken, this is requested. Her (his) original creator is The Forsaken Dev Team on Roblox, in which this 1x1x1x1 originates from. This is mainly based on the "Betrayed" skin in Forsaken, which is based off the DBZ meme "WHAT IF GOKU WAS BETRAYED AND TRAPPED IN A TIME CHANBER FOR A MILLENNIUM", hence the hair. However, the original 1x1x1x1 comes from an alt account created by Shedletsky to back up for the Necrobloxicon's lore, or to also troll players.

All characters in this bot are meant and set to be over 18.
